Who We Are

Healing with Purpose,
Leading with Integrity

Founded with a mission to make quality healthcare accessible, SAMIX MEDICAL CENTER has grown into a trusted name in comprehensive medical care in Kajjansi and the surrounding community. We combine modern medicine with a deeply personal approach — treating every patient as a whole person, not just a condition.

Patient-First Philosophy
Every decision starts with your wellbeing. Our care is personalised, attentive, and built on trust.
Advanced Diagnostics
Our laboratory and imaging services ensure fast, accurate diagnosis so treatment can begin without delay.
Community Rooted
We proudly serve our local community and are deeply committed to improving population health outcomes across Uganda.
5+
Years serving Uganda
98%
Patient satisfaction rate
Inside SAMIX

Our Facilities & Team in Action

State-of-the-art laboratory equipment and a dedicated team committed to precision and care at every step.

Advanced Laboratory Services
Our Dedicated Lab Technicians
What We Offer

Comprehensive Medical Services

From preventive care to specialised treatment, our multidisciplinary team covers a broad spectrum of healthcare needs under one roof.

General Practice
Routine consultations, health screenings, chronic disease management, and preventive care for patients of all ages.
Services include:
  • Annual health checkups
  • Blood pressure monitoring
  • Vaccination programs
  • Chronic disease management
  • Health counseling
Laboratory Services
Accurate and rapid diagnostic testing, blood work, pathology, and specimen analysis with fast turnaround times.
Tests available:
  • Complete blood count(CBC)
  • Typhoid
  • Urinalysis
  • Brucella
  • H Pylori
  • Preganacy Test
  • Hepatitis B
  • Blood Sugar/Diabetis
  • Malaria
  • HIV tests
  • Syphilis
  • Blood Grouping
Emergency Care
Round-the-clock emergency response for acute conditions, trauma, and urgent medical situations requiring immediate attention.
24/7 availability:
  • Emergency triage
  • Acute care treatment
  • Trauma management
  • Stabilization services
  • Ambulance coordination
Maternal & Child Health
Antenatal care, safe deliveries, postnatal support, immunisation, and paediatric wellness for mother and child.
Complete care:
  • Pregnancy monitoring
  • Delivery services
  • Postpartum care
  • Child vaccinations
  • Pediatric checkups
Cardiology
ECG, echocardiography, blood pressure management, and specialist consultations for heart health and cardiovascular conditions.
Diagnostic services:
  • ECG
  • Echocardiography
  • Stress testing
  • Blood pressure monitoring
  • Cardiac consultations
Pharmacy Services
On-site dispensing, prescription fulfilment, medication counselling, and a curated range of quality pharmaceutical products.
Full pharmacy support:
  • Prescription dispensing
  • Drug counseling
  • Generic alternatives
  • Over-the-counter meds
  • Medicine refills
🎒 Now Available · Back to School
Back to School Health Checkup
Comprehensive health screening for children heading back to school — or already in school. Our team visits schools directly, checking blood pressure, temperature, and overall fitness so every child is healthy and ready to learn, whether you are enrolling a new pupil or keeping a current student well all term.
What is included:
  • HIV Testing
  • Typhoid
  • Optimetry(eye check up)
  • Pregnancy Check up
  • Urinalysis(UTI)
  • Malaria
  • Deworming & vitamin supplementation
Available for: Children already in school AND those starting school for the first time.
